abilities.name: poison-touch
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning the target with each hit. This counts as an extra effect for the purposes of Shield Dust. This ability takes effect before Mummy.
abilities.flavorText: May poison a target when the Pokémon makes contact.

abilities.name: gluttony
abilities.shortEffect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon eats any held Berry triggered by low HP when it falls below 50% of its HP, regardless of the Berry's usual threshold.
abilities.flavorText: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.

abilities.name: power-of-alchemy
abilities.shortEffect: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
abilities.effect: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.
